results.title: Zai Lab Receives China NMPA Approval of TIVDAK® (tisotumab vedotin for injection) for the Treatment of Adult Patients with Recurrent or Metastatic Cervical Cancer
Telecel Foundation Healthfest extends healthcare service to Konongo for Ashanti Month
results.description: About 400 people received free health screening during Telecel Foundation’s Healthfest in Konongo About 400 residents of Konongo and surrounding towns have received free, comprehensive health screenings through Telecel Ghana Foundation’s Healthfest, which brought essential healthcare services directly to residents in eastern Ashanti. The health outreach, which forms part of Telecel Ashanti Month this June, [...] The post Telecel Foundation Healthfest extends healthcare service to Konongo for Ashanti Month appeared first on Ghana News Online .
